title: MN1 gene: MedlinePlus Genetics
text:
Matsumoto N. Gain-of-Function MN1 Truncation Variants Cause a Recognizable
Syndrome with Craniofacial and Brain Abnormalities. Am J Hum Genet. 2020 Jan
2;106(1):13-25. doi: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2019.11.011. Epub 2019 Dec 12. Citation on PubMed 
Shao H, Cen J, Chen S, Qiu H, Pan J. Myeloid neoplasms with
t(12;22)(p13;q12)/MN1-EVT6: a systematic review of 12 cases. Ann Hematol. 2018
Mar;97(3):417-424. doi: 10.1007/s00277-017-3208-2. Epub 2017 Dec 22. Citation on PubMed 
Genomic Location 
The MN1 gene is found on chromosome 22 .
